title: Redesign hero section layout and image

requirements.summary: Redesign Hero section with full-width background image layout, overlay, centered content, and updated positioning of CTA buttons and badges while maintaining all existing elements
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section has a visually distinct layout different from the previous side-by-side columns design
New hero image (hero-redesign.dim_1440x900.png) is rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated
Headline 'Reliable care, rooted in community.' is prominently displayed
Both CTA buttons are visible and functional
Stat badges (24/7, 100%, Toledo) and the DODD accreditation badge are present in the updated layout
Design is responsive and looks good on mobile and desktop
Primary green (#2D7A5F) brand colors and typography remain consistent with the rest of the site

file_operations.description: Replace the current two-column side-by-side layout with a full-width hero design using frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-redesign.dim_1440x900.png as a background image. Add a semi-transparent overlay for text readability. Center or asymmetrically position the headline 'Reliable care, rooted in community.' and subtext. Reposition the CTA buttons ('Get Started Today' and 'Learn More') within the overlaid content area. Integrate the stat badges (24/7 Support, 100% Certified Staff, Toledo-Based) and the DODD accreditation badge into the new layout, ensuring they remain visible and appropriately positioned. Maintain responsive behavior for mobile and desktop viewports, and preserve the primary green brand color and existing typography.
